untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'euphoria' or 'hysterical buying' by comparing price to fundamental/economic value (30%+ deviation). This requires an external fundamental value indicator not available in the allowed indicator set. RSI and price-to-MA crossovers used as proxies for momentum/reversal detection, but true euphoria detection is not translatable to technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about market cycle psychology and requires fundamental valuation data (economic value, fair value estimates) which are not available in the technical indicator toolkit. Attempted translation using RSI >70 (overbought/euphoria proxy) and 10-day MA crossover (trend reversal) as practical alternatives. Entry conditions left empty because the signal requires holding from Stage 2 (entry already made) and monitoring for Stage 4 exit. The 15-day max hold window reflects the 'time_to_peak_after_euphoria_onset_days' parameter.
